title: cleistochloa subjuncea
intro: Cleistochloa subjuncea, also known as the 'tall wheat grass', is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Cleistochloa subjuncea include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Cleistochloa subjuncea can be prepared as a tea, juice, or supplement, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
